description: Module-level docs (secretx-tpm2/src/lib.rs:14-15) state: 'The TPM transport is configured via the ?tcti= query parameter or the TPM2TOOLS_TCTI / TCTI environment variable.' But the code (lines 115-118) only reads parsed.param("tcti") and falls back to the hardcoded DEFAULT_TCTI constant. No std::env::var("TPM2TOOLS_TCTI") or std::env::var("TCTI") call exists anywhere in the crate. The documentation promises a feature the code does not implement. Either add the env var fallback (which is what tpm2-tools users expect) or correct the docs to reflect the actual behavior.
title: tpm2: docs claim TCTI env var fallback but code does not read it
